description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a visibly textured, worn surface, suggesting frequent use. The handle is capped at the bottom with a darker section, possibly for added grip or protection. The axe head is made of dark metal, showing signs of wear and oxidation, with a broad, flat poll and a single, slightly convex cutting edge. The blade is thick and heavy, with a subtle taper toward the edge, and the poll is squared off, suitable for striking. The head is mounted securely onto the handle, with no visible fasteners, indicating a traditional wedged fit. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or branding.
description: A hand axe with a curved, textured wooden handle and a heavy, worn metal head featuring a single cutting edge and flat poll. The design is utilitarian and shows signs of frequent use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the axe, highlighting the curved wooden handle and the broad, flat metal blade.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow edge of the blade and the handle's alignment, emphasizing the thickness of the axe head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other face of the blade and the handle's curvature.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the poll of the axe head and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a textured, worn surface and a darker grip cap; oval cross-section for ergonomic grip.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, broad metal blade with a convex edge profile and a flat, squared poll; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fit with the blade mounted onto the handle, no visible fasteners.
